attempts.last_message_excerpt: {"title":"Jakal-flow Local Environment","summary":"First freeze the default harness contract so the repository has one explicit definition of the Jakal-flow runtime, profile shape, and entrypoint expectations. Then fan out into two dependency-safe branches: one provisions the upstream checkout, managed target, and Python runtime under `.local/`, while the other wires prerequisite detection, verification, and operator guidance for the full Python plus React and Tauri stack. Finally, rejoin tho...
